title: Edge key registry item (GET /edge/registry)
description: One edge client public key's enrollment record — the Network surface's enrollment queue and key inventory. Source of truth: doorman's key registry (Phase 1 formalization per CONSOLE-CONTRACTS.md section 3.3; shapes per the Network spec, coordinated with PetalNet/doorman — the doorman enrollment gap is as-built blocker #2, so `pending` rows are the approval queue the edge.enroll.approve/deny ops act on). Filters: `state`, plus the shared limit/cursor/since. Consumers MUST ignore unknown fields.

pubkey_fp.description: Public key fingerprint — the stable identity of the edge client (primary key).

handle.description: Canonical handle bound at enrollment; null while pending/revoked-unbound.

host.description: Machine label in canonical form ('.N' for lab dot-hosts); null when unknown.

state.description: Enrollment lifecycle. pending = awaiting edge.enroll.approve/deny; revoked keys never connect again.

requested_handle.description: The handle the client ASKED for at first contact (unverified — never trusted until approval binds `handle`).

source_ip.description: IP the enrollment request came from (diagnostics); null when unrecorded.

first_seen_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC — first contact from this key; null when unknown.

enrolled_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC — when enrollment was approved; null unless state=enrolled (or historically enrolled before revocation).

enrolled_by.description: Principal id that approved the enrollment (audit); null unless approved.

last_seen_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC — most recent contact from this key; null when never seen since enrollment.
